chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-19 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 606/24 3.For hearing of Bail Application 22-04-2024 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
